nasb.text: You blind Pharisee, first clean the inside of the cup and of the dish, so that the outside of it may become clean also.

esv.text: You blind Pharisee! First clean the inside of the cup and the plate, that the outside also may be clean.

cnv.text: 瞎眼的法利賽人哪，先把杯和盤的裡面洗淨，好使外面也可以乾淨。

ccb.text: 瞎眼的法利赛人啊！要先洗净杯盘的里面，好让外面也干净。

csbs.text: 你这瞎眼的法利赛人哪！当先洗净杯子的里面，好使外面也洁净。
